mapper.select:
SELECT a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.item_category_idx, a.auction_thumbnail_img, a.auction_title, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx, s.auction_status_name, ic.item_category_name, COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count, IFNULL(MIN(b.bid_price), 0) AS min_price FROM auction a JOIN auction_status s ON a.auction_status_idx = s.auction_status_idx LEFT JOIN item_category ic ON a.item_category_idx = ic.item_category_idx LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx WHERE a.auction_is_deleted = 'N'
AND a.item_category_idx = #{categoryIdx}
AND ( a.auction_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ic.item_category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.item_category_idx, a.auction_thumbnail_img, a.auction_title, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx, s.auction_status_name, ic.item_category_name ORDER BY a.auction_regdate DESC

SELECT a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.item_category_idx, a.auction_thumbnail_img, a.auction_title, a.auction_desc, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_decision_deadline, a.auction_status_idx, s.auction_status_name, ic.item_category_name, COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count, IFNULL(MIN(b.bid_price), 0) AS min_price FROM auction a JOIN auction_status s ON a.auction_status_idx = s.auction_status_idx LEFT JOIN item_category ic ON a.item_category_idx = ic.item_category_idx LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx WHERE a.auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.item_category_idx, a.auction_thumbnail_img, a.auction_title, a.auction_desc, a.auction_target_price, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_decision_deadline, a.auction_status_idx, s.auction_status_name, ic.item_category_name

SELECT a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx, COUNT(b.bid_idx) AS b_count FROM auction a LEFT JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx AND b.bid_status_idx != 4 WHERE a.auction_status_idx = 1 AND a.auction_end_at < NOW() AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' GROUP BY a.auction_idx, a.buyer_idx, a.auction_end_at, a.auction_status_idx
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auction ( buyer_idx, item_category_idx, auction_thumbnail_img, auction_title, auction_desc, auction_target_price, auction_start_at, auction_end_at, auction_decision_deadline, auction_status_idx, auction_regdate ) VALUES ( #{buyerIdx}, #{itemCategoryIdx}, #{auctionThumbnailImg}, #{auctionTitle}, #{auctionDesc}, #{auctionTargetPrice}, NOW(), #{auctionEndAt}, #{auctionDecisionDeadline}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE auction SET auction_title = #{auctionTitle}, auction_desc = #{auctionDesc}, auction_target_price = #{auctionTargetPrice}, auction_end_at = #{auctionEndAt}, auction_decision_deadline = #{auctionDecisionDeadline}, auction_moddate = NOW() WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND auction_status_idx = 1 AND auction_is_deleted = 'N'
